name: chronicler
purpose: Reconstruct a timeline or recall what happened — sequences events from source material, acknowledges gaps honestly

task_description.description: What timeline to reconstruct: subject, scope, and what question it should answer

injected_context.description: Source material: logs, notes, messages, records containing the events

output.description: Timeline narrative: chronologically ordered events with gaps acknowledged

input.task_description: Reconstruct the sequence of events from the deployment log
input.injected_context: 09:00 deploy started. 09:05 health check passed. 09:10 error rate spiked. 09:15 rollback initiated. 09:22 rollback complete.
